{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-451", "name": "User Interface (UI) Misrepresentation of Critical Information"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-xv5w-cw7x-72gj. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
The id utility in uutils coreutils exhibits incorrect behavior in its "pretty print" output when the real UID and effective UID differ. The implementation incorrectly uses the effective GID instead of the effective UID when performing a name lookup for the effective user. This results in misleading diagnostic output that can cause automated scripts or system administrators to make incorrect decisions regarding file permissions or access control.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-53gr-wmf4-8hh3", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:52:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-53gr-wmf4-8hh3", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-53gr-wmf4-8hh3"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:40Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:46Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35371", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/10006", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-53gr-wmf4-8hh3"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils's User Interface (UI) Misrepresents Critical Information", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T19:55:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-53gr-wmf4-8hh3", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T19:55:29Z"}
